statement: In every magma, Equation 1609 (`x = (y * z) * (w * (y * y))`) implies Equation 1230 (`x = x * (((x * y) * x) * z)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0048
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y z) (op w (op y y)))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op x (op (op (op x y) x) z))
